tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Wildest Dreams x Maroon

[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
He said, "Let's get out of this town[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Drive out of the city, away from the crowd"[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I thought heaven can't help me now[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Nothing lasts forever[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]
But this is gonna take me down[/tab]

[Prechorus 1]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
He's so tall, and handsome as hell[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
He's so bad, but he does it so well[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
I can see the end as it begins[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]*            [ch]D[/ch]*
My one condition is[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Say you'll remember me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Standing in a nice dress[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
Staring at the sunset, babe[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Red lips and rosy cheeks[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Say you'll see me again[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
Even if it's just in your[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Wildest dreams, ah ahh ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]*
Wildest dreams, ah ahh ah[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
When the silence came we[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Were shaking, blind, and hazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
How the hell did we lose sight of us again?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Sobbing with your head in your hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Ain't that the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Shit always ends?[/tab]

[Prechorus 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
You were standing hollow-eyed in the hallway[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
Carnations you had thought were roses, that's us[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
I feel you no matter what[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
The rubies that I gave up[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
When I lost you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
The one I was dancing with[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
In New York, no shoes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
Looked up at the sky and it was[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
The bergundy on my t-shirt when[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
You splashed your mine into me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
And how the blood rushed into my cheeks[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
So scarlet, it was[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
The mark they saw on my collarbone[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
The rust that grew between telephones[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
The lips I used to call home[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
So scarlet, it was[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
You'll see me in hindsight[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Tangled up with you all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Burning it down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Someday when you leave me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I bet these memories[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
Follow you around[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
You'll see me in hindsight[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Tangled up with you all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Burning it down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Someday when you leave me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I bet these memories[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
Follow you around[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]*                 [ch]D[/ch]*
And that's a real fucking legacy to leave[/tab]

[Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]*                  [ch]D[/ch]*
Say you'll remember me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]*
Standing in a nice dress[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]*
Staring at the sunset, babe[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]*                [ch]D[/ch]*
Red lips and rosy cheeks[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]*
Say you'll see me again[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]*
Even if it's just pretend[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Say you'll remember me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Standing in a nice dress[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
Staring at the sunset, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Red lips and rosy cheeks[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Say you'll see me again[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
Even if it's just in your[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Wildest dreams, ah ahh ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Wildest Dreams, ah ahh ah[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]*      [ch]D[/ch]*         [ch]Am[/ch]*
In your wildest dreams, ah ahh ah[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]*                [ch]G[/ch]*
So scarlet, it was maroon[/tab]
